alreadyDiscontinuedDescription: This patient is already enrolled in the selected program and has already been discontinued.
alreadyEnrolledDescription: This patient is already enrolled in the selected program and cannot be enrolled again.
cannotDiscontinueEnrollment: Cannot discontinue an enrollment that does not exist
causeOfDeathQuestionIdIsNotConfigured: Cause of death question ID is not configured
dateOfDeathQuestionIdIsNotConfigured: Date of death question ID is not configured
enrolledToProgram: The patient has been successfully enrolled in the program.
enrollmentDiscontinued: The patient's program enrollment has been successfully discontinued.
errorLaunchingWorkspaceSubtitle: An unexpected error occurred while launching the workspace.
invalidWorkspaceNameSubtitle: Please provide a valid workspace name.
noPatientContextSubtitle: This button is only active when a patient chart is open.
patientCannotBeMarkedAsDeceasedBecauseNo: Patient cannot be marked as deceased because no payload is supplied
patientIdentifierDuplicationDescription: The identifier provided is already associated with an existing patient. Please check the identifier and try again.
patientIsAlreadyMarkedAsDeceased: Patient is already marked as deceased
successfullyMarkedAsDeceased: The patient has successfully been marked as deceased
valuesOutOfBound: Some of the values are out of bounds
